name: reasoning-interplay-pretraining-rl
description: Studies interaction between pre-training, mid-training phases, and RL in reasoning models
content:
## Pre-Training, Mid-Training, and RL Interplay

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.07783 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.07783

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
